# mxroute_email_accounts (Data Source)

Lists the mailboxes on a domain. For one mailbox, use the `mxroute_email_account` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_email_accounts" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain whose mailboxes to list.

### Read-Only

- `accounts` (Attributes List) The mailboxes on the domain. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--accounts))
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the domain name.

<a id="nestedatt--accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `accounts`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The full email address.
- `limit` (Number) Daily outbound send limit.
- `quota` (Number) Storage quota in megabytes (0 = unlimited).
- `sent` (Number) Messages sent today.
- `suspended` (Boolean) Whether the mailbox is suspended.
- `usage` (Number) Storage currently used, in megabytes.
- `username` (String) The local part of the mailbox address.
